title: Nurse Handover Report

segments.text: She was admitted yesterday with pneumonia.
Her oxygen saturation has improved overnight, currently at ninety-six percent on two litres.
IV antibiotics are continuing — second dose due at ten.
She's eating small meals and tolerating fluids.
Her family will visit this afternoon.
No social work referral has been made yet.

transcript: This is Mrs. Patel in bed four. She was admitted yesterday with pneumonia. Her oxygen saturation has improved overnight, currently at ninety-six percent on two litres. She's afebrile this morning. IV antibiotics are continuing — second dose due at ten. She's eating small meals and tolerating fluids. Her family will visit this afternoon. No social work referral has been made yet.
